IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: CALSTART DEVELOPS AND IMPLEMENTS LARGE-SCALE ZERO-EMISSION TRANSPORTATION PROGRAMS AND SOLUTIONS IN COLLABORATION WITH BUSINESSES, GOVERNMENT AGENCIES, AND COMMUNITIES TO SUPPORT AMERICAN MANUFACTURING, CREATION OF JOBS IN THE ADVANCED TRANSPORTATION TECHNOLOGY SECTOR AND REDUCE EMISSIONS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: FOR MORE THAN 30 YEARS, CALSTART HAS PARTNERED WITH INDUSTRY, GOVERNMENT, AND COMMUNITIES TO ACCELERATE THE DEVELOPMENT AND DEPLOYMENT OF ADVANCED TRANSPORTATION TECHNOLOGIES. CALSTART DESIGNS AND IMPLEMENTS VEHICLE INFRASTRUCTURE PROGRAMS THAT REDUCE EMISSIONS, GROW DOMESTIC SUPPLY CHAINS, AND IMPROVE OPERATIONAL EFFICIENCY. CALSTART PROVIDES TECHNICAL, REGULATORY AND POLICY SUPPORT TO SCALE COMMERCIALLY VIABLE, ZERO-EMISSION TRANSPORTATION SOLUTIONS THAT BENEFIT FLEET OPERATORS, LOCAL ECONOMIES, AND THE PUBLIC.
IRS990.Desc: MARKET ACCELERATION: ENABLING FLEET TRANSFORMATION-CALSTART DESIGNS, LEADS, AND IMPLEMENTS ZERO-EMISSION VEHICLE AND INFRASTRUCTURE INCENTIVE PROGRAMS FOR TRUCKS, BUSES, CARS, AND OFF-ROAD EQUIPMENT FOR FEDERAL, STATE, AND LOCAL GOVERNMENTS. THESE PROGRAMS SUPPORT PRIVATE AND PUBLIC FLEETS ACROSS THE U.S., HELPING REDUCE OPERATING COSTS AND EXPANDING DOMESTIC ZERO-EMISSION VEHICLE AND INFRASTRUCTURE MANUFACTURING. HIGHLIGHTS FROM FY2024 INCLUDE: - THE US DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY AWARDED CALSTART $4 MILLION TO LEAD THE CHARGE@WORK PROGRAM, A NATIONAL INITIATIVE TO SUPPORT EMPLOYER-BASED CHARGING. - THE COMMUNITIES IN CHARGE PROJECT, WITH AN $88 MILLION INVESTMENT FROM THE CALIFORNIA ENERGY COMMISSION (CES) AND THE ENERGIIZE PROJECT ($276 MILLION INVESTMENT THROUGH 2026) PROVIDES INCENTIVES VIA REIMBURSEMENT FOR EV AND H2 INFRASTRUCTURE TO SUPPORT MEDIUM/HEAVY-DUTY ZEVS. - IN PARTNERSHIP WITH THE MASSACHUSETTS CLEAN ENERGY CENTER (MASSCEC), CALSTART LAUNCHED THE RIDE CLEAN MASS PROGRAM, AN INITIATIVE AIMED AT HELPING THE VEHICLE-FOR-HIRE (VFH) INDUSTRY SWITCH TO ZERO-EMISSION VEHICLES. BY PROVIDING FINANCIAL INCENTIVES, THE RIDE CLEAN MASS PROGRAM HAS EARMARKED $5.35 MILLION TO SUPPORT DRIVERS THROUGH 2025. RIDE CLEAN MASS CHARGING HUB PROGRAM IS THE SECOND PHASE OF THE MASSCEC PARTNERSHIP WITH A $6.1 MILLION INVESTMENT TO CONSTRUCT 57 CHARGING HUBS ACROSS THE STATE THROUGH 2026. - CALIFORNIA'S AIR RESOURCES BOARD'S (CARB) CLEAN OFF-ROAD EQUIPMENT VOUCHER INCENTIVE PROJECT (CORE) HAS CUMULATIVELY RECEIVED $538 MILLION IN FUNDING, INCLUDING $15 MILLION ALLOCATED IN 2024 FOR ZERO-EMISSION EQUIPMENT FOR SMALL BUSINESSES AND PUBLIC AGENCIES. - CARB HAS CUMULATIVELY FUNDED $2.288 BILLION FOR THE HYBRID AND ZERO EMISSION TRUCK AND BUS VOUCHER INCENTIVE PROJECT (HVIP), INCLUDING $15 MILLION FOR THE INNOVATIVE SMALL E-FLEET (ISEF) SET-ASIDE WITHIN HVIP IN 2024.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT AND DEMONSTRATION PROGRAM- CALSTART PROVIDES INDEPENDENT ANALYSIS AND GUIDANCE TO HELP GOVERNMENT AND INDUSTRY ACCELERATE THE DEPLOYMENT OF COMMERCIALLY VIABLE ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES. CALSTART SERVES AS THE MEDIUM- AND HEAVY-DUTY VEHICLE ADVISOR TO THE CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD (CARB) AND ASSISTS IN DEVELOPMENT OF ITS ONGOING HEAVY DUTY INVESTMENT PLAN, OFFERING TECHNICAL EXPERTISE TO ALIGN VEHICLE AND INFRASTRUCTURE PLANNING WITH MARKET NEEDS.IN 2024, CALSTART HOSTED TWO LARGE-SCALE RIDE AND DRIVE EVENTS IN POMONA AND OAKLAND, CA, FEATURING 70+ ZERO-EMISSION VEHICLES AND EQUIPMENT FOR FLEET OPERATORS, DEMONSTRATING REAL-WORLD PRODUCT READINESS AND PERFORMANCE.CALSTART IS A SUBRECIPIENT ON THREE EPA CLEAN PORTS PROGRAM AWARDS ON THE EAST COAST: - WITH THE PORT AUTHORITY OF NEW YORK AND NEW JERSEY ($451M TOTAL AWARD), CALSTART IS MANAGING $51M IN SUPPORT OF A CLEAN EQUIPMENT VOUCHER PROGRAM AND DEVELOPMENT OF NEAR-PORT CHARGING HUBS THROUGH A GREEN DRAYAGE ACCELERATOR. - IN MARYLAND, CALSTART IS SUPPORTING THE PORT AUTHORITY'S PLANNING GRANT AWARD ($147M TOTAL AWARD) THROUGH TRUCK OPERATOR ENGAGEMENT. CALSTART IS MANAGING $20M TO ADMINISTER A CLEAN EQUIPMENT AND INFRASTRUCTURE VOUCHER PROGRAM THROUGH A GREEN DRAYAGE ACCELERATOR. - CALSTART WAS AWARDED THE PRIME CONTRACT BY MASSCEC FOR THE RECENTLY LAUNCHED MHD MOBILE CHARGING PROGRAM, THROUGH WHICH FOUR FLEETS WILL PILOT MOBILE/TEMPORARY CHARGING SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE FLEET ELECTRIFICATION. - AS A PART OF A CONSULTANT TEAM, CALSTART COMPLETED THE MAINE CLEAN TRANSPORTATION ROADMAP FOR MEDIUM- AND HEAVY-DUTY VEHICLES FOR MAINE DOT, THE GOVERNOR'S ENERGY OFFICE, AND THE GOVERNOR'S OFFICE OF POLICY INNOVATION AND THE FUTURE. - CALSTART ALSO ADMINISTERS AND PROVIDES OUTREACH TO NYSERDA'S NEW YORK TRUCK VOUCHER INCENTIVE PROGRAM (NYTVIP). - MASS FLEET ADVISOR IS A TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR PRIVATE MHDV FLEETS; CALSTART IS THE PRIME RECIPIENT OF MASSACHUSETTS CLEAN ENERGY CENTER'S (MASSCEC) PROGRAM. - IN 2024, CALSTART WAS AWARDED A FLEET ADVISORY PROGRAM IN NEW JERSEY BY THE NJ DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: PROMOTING ADVANCED TRANSPORTATION TECHNOLOGIES CHAMPIONS (MEMBER SERVICES, PUBLICATIONS, AND CONFERENCES)- CALSTART PROVIDES A WIDE RANGE OF NETWORKING AND STRATEGIC PARTNERING OPPORTUNITIES FOR ITS 250+ MEMBER COMPANIES AND STAKEHOLDER ORGANIZATIONS. CALSTART MEMBERS BENEFIT FROM THE UNIQUE RESEARCH AND ANALYSIS REPORTS AND HAVE ACCESS TO CURATED INFORMATION ABOUT OPPORTUNITIES AND INDUSTRY TRENDS IN ADVANCED TRANSPORTATION TECHNOLOGIES. OUR PROGRAM TEAMS ALSO CONDUCT WEBINARS TO INFORM MEMBERS AND OTHERS OF THE LATEST DEVELOPMENTS, OPPORTUNITIES, AND FORECASTS ABOUT EV'S AND OTHER ADVANCED TRANSPORTATION TECHNOLOGIES.IN 2024, CALSTART PUBLISHED UPDATES TO ITS INDUSTRY-LEADING "ZEROING IN ON ZERO-EMISSION TRUCKS AND "ZEROING IN ON ZERO-EMISSION BUSES" REPORTS, BOTH OF WHICH PROVIDE CONCISE AND CURRENT SNAPSHOTS OF ZERO-EMISSION VEHICLE DEPLOYMENT STATISTICS ACROSS THE UNITED STATES. THESE REPORTS OFFER INSIGHTS INTO KEY TRENDS DRIVING GROWTH IN ADOPTION, AS WELL AS OPPORTUNITIES TO FURTHER ACCELERATE THIS GROWTH THAT CAN HELP INFORM POLICYMAKERS, MANUFACTURERS, FLEET OWNERS, AND FINANCIAL STAKEHOLDERS. CALSTART ALSO DEVELOPED A GROUNDBREAKING FINANCIAL MODEL, PUBLISHED IN "FINANCING FLEET ELECTRIFICATION: BATTERY-ELECTRIC TRUCK COMPONENT RESALE HIGHLIGHTS RESIDUAL VALUE UPSIDE", FOR BENCHMARKING THE ESTIMATED VALUE OF BATTERY-ELECTRIC TRUCKS (BETS) AT THE END OF THEIR FINANCING TERMS. THIS METHOD SHOWS THAT BET LEASE AND FINANCING UNDERWRITERS SHOULD LOOK TO SECOND-LIFE APPLICATIONS OF BET COMPONENTS AND CAN ATTRIBUTE BETS WITH HIGHER RESIDUAL VALUE, MEANING MORE AFFORDABLE PAYMENTS FOR FLEETS. IN ADDITION, CALSTART'S DRIVE TO ZERO PROGRAM PUBLISHED THE THIRD ANNUAL "GLOBAL PROGRESS TOWARD DECARBONIZING TRANSPORTATION: MULTI-COUNTRY ACTION PLAN FOR 2024 UPDATE (MCAP)", WHICH HIGHLIGHTS THE FORWARD ACTION OF THE 38 GLOBAL MOU COUNTRY SIGNATORIES TOWARD FULFILLING THE GOAL OF 30% NEW MEDIUM- AND HEAVY-DUTY VEHICLE (MHDV) SALES BEING ZERO-EMISSION BY 2030, WITH 100% BY 2040. THE 2024 MCAP, PREPARED FOR GLOBAL MOU COUNTRIES AND ENDORSERS, PROVIDES NEW INFORMATION ON THE OVERALL ZERO-EMISSION MHDV MARKET AND OFFERS AN OVERVIEW OF THE IMPACTFUL POLICY MEASURES IMPLEMENTED BY GLOBAL MOU SIGNATORY NATIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CALSTART HIRED LOBBYISTS TO IMPACT POLICIES CONSISTENT WITH THE CALSTART, INC. MISSION.

GENERALLY ACCEPTED ACCOUNTING PRINCIPLES PROVIDE ACCOUNTING AND DISCLOSURE GUIDANCE ABOUT POSITIONS TAKEN BY AN ORGANIZATION IN ITS TAX RETURNS THAT MIGHT BE UNCERTAIN. MANAGEMENT HAS CONSIDERED ITS TAX POSITIONS AND BELIEVES THAT ALL OF THE POSITIONS TAKEN BY THE ORGANIZATION IN ITS FEDERAL AND STATE EXEMPT ORGANIZATION TAX RETURNS ARE MORE LIKELY THAN NOT TO BE SUSTAINED UPON EXAMINATION. THE ORGANIZATION'S RETURNS ARE SUBJECT TO EXAMINATION BY FEDERAL AND STATE TAXING AUTHORITIES, GENERALLY FOR FOUR YEARS AFTER THEY ARE FILED.
GRANT EXPENSES ARE ACCUMULATED USING THE JOB COST MODULE IN SAGE 100 ERP. GRANT ACTIVITIES ARE CONDUCTED BASED UPON THE GRANT CONTRACT AND MONITORED BY PROJECT MANAGERS.
CALSTART PROVIDES A NON-FIXED, PERFORMANCE-BASED DISCRETIONARY BONUS TO EMPLOYEES.

NameOfInterested.PersonNm: CHRIS STODDART OF NEW FLYER OF AMER

BusTrInvolveInterestedPrsnGrp.TransactionDesc: CHRIS STODDART IS PRESIDENT OF NEW FLYER OF AMERICA, WHICH IS A PROGRAM BENEFICIARY OF CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD HYBRID AND ZERO-EMISSION TRUCK AND BUS VOUCHER INCENTIVE PROJECT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CALSTART, INC.'S OUTSIDE TAX PREPARERS AND FINANCE STAFF PREPARE THE FORM 990 WHICH IS THEN REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY THE CALSTART CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER. THE FORM IS THEN SENT TO THE FULL BOARD BEFORE MAILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CALSTART, INC. REQUIRES ALL EMPLOYEES TO DISCLOSE, AT LEAST ANNUALLY, ALL SOURCES OF INCOME FROM COMPENSATION OR FROM OWNERSHIP OF EVERY OUTSIDE COMPETING ENTERPRISE PROVIDING GOODS OR SERVICES TO CALSTART, INC. IN THE LAST TWELVE MONTHS. IN ADDITION, EACH NEW BOARD MEMBER RECEIVES A BINDER THAT INCLUDES THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD REVIEWED CALSTART INC.'S CEO AND CFO COMPENSATION AND DATA OF COMPARABLE COMPENSATION FOR SIMILARLY QUALIFIED NONPROFIT EXECUTIVES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SOME OR ALL OF THESE ITEMS MAY BE AVAILABLE AS PART OF A GRANT APPLICATION. IN ADDITION, WE MAKE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS AVAILABLE FOR REVIEW BY THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
